languages.text: "Потомок Жбрешчиша, не так ли? Я определенно вижу некое сходство, вот только выучка полковника была более... благородной".

traits.locale_text: "Потомок Жбрешчиша, не так ли? Я определенно вижу некое сходство, вот только выучка полковника была более... благородной".

languages.text: "A descendant of Zbrestshchysh, are you not? I do see a certain resemblance. Only the colonel's bearing was somewhat more... refined."
languages.original_text: "Потомок Жбрешчиша, не так ли? Я определенно вижу некое сходство, вот только выучка полковника была более... благородной".

traits.locale_text: "A descendant of Zbrestshchysh, are you not? I do see a certain resemblance. Only the colonel's bearing was somewhat more... refined."
"A descendant of Zbrestshchysh, are you not? I do see a certain resemblance. Only the colonel's bearing was somewhat more... refined."
"A descendant of Zbrestshchysh, are you not? I do see a certain resemblance. Only the colonel's bearing was somewhat more... refined."
"A descendant of Zbrestshchysh, are you not? I do see a certain resemblance. Only the colonel's bearing was somewhat more... refined."

languages.text: "Ihr seid ein Nachkomme von Zbrestshchysh, nicht wahr? Ich erkenne eine gewisse Ähnlichkeit. Nur das Auftreten des Colonels war etwas ... kultivierter."
languages.original_text: "A descendant of Zbrestshchysh, are you not? I do see a certain resemblance. Only the colonel's bearing was somewhat more... refined."

traits.locale_text: "Ihr seid ein Nachkomme von Zbrestshchysh, nicht wahr? Ich erkenne eine gewisse Ähnlichkeit. Nur das Auftreten des Colonels war etwas ... kultivierter."

languages.text: « Vous êtes un descendant de Zbrestshchysh, je me trompe ? Je remarque une certaine ressemblance, si ce n'est que le colonel avait une posture plus... distinguée. »
languages.original_text: "A descendant of Zbrestshchysh, are you not? I do see a certain resemblance. Only the colonel's bearing was somewhat more... refined."

traits.locale_text: « Vous êtes un descendant de Zbrestshchysh, je me trompe ? Je remarque une certaine ressemblance, si ce n'est que le colonel avait une posture plus... distinguée. »

languages.text: «Usted es descendiente de Zbrestshchysh, supongo. Tiene cierto parecido, aunque aquel coronel tenía un porte más... refinado».
languages.original_text: "A descendant of Zbrestshchysh, are you not? I do see a certain resemblance. Only the colonel's bearing was somewhat more... refined."

traits.locale_text: «Usted es descendiente de Zbrestshchysh, supongo. Tiene cierto parecido, aunque aquel coronel tenía un porte más... refinado».

languages.text: "Sen Zbrestshchysh'in soyundan geliyorsun, değil mi? Belli bir benzerlik görüyorum. Gerçi Albay'ın duruşu biraz daha... Rafine idi."
languages.original_text: "A descendant of Zbrestshchysh, are you not? I do see a certain resemblance. Only the colonel's bearing was somewhat more... refined."

traits.locale_text: "Sen Zbrestshchysh'in soyundan geliyorsun, değil mi? Belli bir benzerlik görüyorum. Gerçi Albay'ın duruşu biraz daha... Rafine idi."

languages.text: “你是兹布雷什契什的后人吧？我确实看出几分相似。只不过，那位上校的仪态要更……优雅些。”
languages.original_text: "A descendant of Zbrestshchysh, are you not? I do see a certain resemblance. Only the colonel's bearing was somewhat more... refined."

traits.locale_text: “你是兹布雷什契什的后人吧？我确实看出几分相似。只不过，那位上校的仪态要更……优雅些。”

languages.text: 「ズブレシュチシの末裔ですね。確かに似ています。ただ、大佐の佇まいは少しだけ...洗練されていました」
languages.original_text: "A descendant of Zbrestshchysh, are you not? I do see a certain resemblance. Only the colonel's bearing was somewhat more... refined."

traits.locale_text: 「ズブレシュチシの末裔ですね。確かに似ています。ただ、大佐の佇まいは少しだけ...洗練されていました」
